title: Add Aventi to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Aventi](https://aventi-web.vercel.app/) to business
- Aventi is a swipe-first discovery app for local events, nightlife, and experiences. It helps users find what to do nearby.

Fixes #11585

gist.headline: Plans are in bloom
gist.blurb: Aventi joined the garden: swipe through local events, nightlife, and nearby things worth leaving the house for. The calendar has finally learned to be a little more interesting.
gist.summary: Added Aventi to the Pollinations business directory, highlighting its swipe-first app for discovering nearby events, nightlife, and experiences.
gist.impact: People browsing Pollinations-powered projects can now find Aventi as a local discovery app for deciding what to do nearby.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly as a friendly local guide, holding a tiny swipe-card phone that reveals cozy pixel flyers for music, food, and neighborhood events. Surround her with flowering planters, a warmly lit city noticeboard, and small event icons to represent discovering nearby experiences.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny tour-guide scarf, swiping through a phone full of local event cards beside a warm neighborhood noticeboard with music, café, and night-out flyers. Lime green (#ecf874) appears prominently in glowing planters and screen accents, with pixel flowers and vines around the scene; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
